title: With Dangote Refinery, Nigeria is on the verge of becoming net exporter of fuel – Shettima - FinancialEDGE
description: Vice President Kashim Shettima has said Nigeria is on the threshold of becoming a net exporter of refined petroleum products, driven by the operational capacity of the Dangote Petroleum Refinery, Africa’s largest single-train refinery located in Lagos. Shettima made the declaration on Thursday while speaking at the High-Level Accra Reset Initiative meeting held on the
html: Vice President Kashim Shettima has said Nigeria is on the threshold of becoming a net exporter of refined petroleum products, driven by the operational capacity of the Dangote Petroleum Refinery, Africa’s largest single-train refinery located in Lagos.
